item.title: StarTalk: Does cold really exist?
item.description: StarTalk explores the idea behind the phrase “cold doesn’t exist” in a simple, science-focused way.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Does cold really exist?
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the idea behind the phrase “cold doesn’t exist” in a simple, science-focused way.

item.title: StarTalk: Why glass blocks infrared light
item.description: StarTalk explores why transparent glass can still be opaque to infrared light.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Why glass blocks infrared light
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why transparent glass can still be opaque to infrared light.

item.title: StarTalk on the odds of a simulation
item.description: StarTalk explores the idea that we may be living in a simulation, and why the odds are considered low.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk on the odds of a simulation
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the idea that we may be living in a simulation, and why the odds are considered low.

item.title: Why oxygen matters for life
item.description: StarTalk explores why oxygen is essential and how it supports life.

media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why oxygen is essential and how it supports life.

item.title: Should We Have AI in Schools?
item.description: StarTalk explores the question of whether AI should be used in schools.

item.title: Comparing Intelligence Across Species
item.description: A look at how scientists study intelligence in humans and animals, and what we can infer about potential intelligence beyond Earth.

media:content.media:title: Comparing Intelligence Across Species
media:content.media:description: A look at how scientists study intelligence in humans and animals, and what we can infer about potential intelligence beyond Earth.

item.title: Are We Living in a Simulation?
item.description: An exploration of the simulation hypothesis, examining scientific ideas and philosophical arguments about the nature of reality.

media:content.media:title: Are We Living in a Simulation?
media:content.media:description: An exploration of the simulation hypothesis, examining scientific ideas and philosophical arguments about the nature of reality.

item.title: Is “Nothing” Part of Everything?
item.description: An exploration of how science and philosophy define “nothing,” and how it relates to our understanding of space, matter, and existence.

media:content.media:title: Is “Nothing” Part of Everything?
media:content.media:description: An exploration of how science and philosophy define “nothing,” and how it relates to our understanding of space, matter, and existence.

item.title: The Science Behind Airplanes Explained
item.description: A clear look at how airplanes fly, covering lift, thrust, and the physics that keep aircraft in the air.

media:content.media:title: The Science Behind Airplanes Explained
media:content.media:description: A clear look at how airplanes fly, covering lift, thrust, and the physics that keep aircraft in the air.

item.title: Could a Dark Matter Planet Exist?
item.description: A look at whether planets made of dark matter are possible, based on current theories about how dark matter behaves in the universe.

media:content.media:title: Could a Dark Matter Planet Exist?
media:content.media:description: A look at whether planets made of dark matter are possible, based on current theories about how dark matter behaves in the universe.

item.title: How Many Galaxies Are There?
item.description: A look at current estimates of the number of galaxies in the observable universe and how scientists arrive at these figures.

media:content.media:title: How Many Galaxies Are There?
media:content.media:description: A look at current estimates of the number of galaxies in the observable universe and how scientists arrive at these figures.

item.title: Why You Can’t Divide by Zero
item.description: A simple explanation of why division by zero is undefined in mathematics and how it breaks the basic rules of arithmetic.

media:content.media:title: Why You Can’t Divide by Zero
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of why division by zero is undefined in mathematics and how it breaks the basic rules of arithmetic.
